sequenceDiagram
    participant A
    participant B
    A->>B: Hello
    Note right of B: Think
    B-->>A: Reply
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
  | Hello   |
  +-------->|
  |         |
  |         | +-------+
  |         | | Think |
  |         | +-------+
  |         |
  | Reply   |
  |<........+
  |         |
